mapper.select: select o.unionpay_order_no trade_no from `order` o inner join order_detail od on o.id = od.order_id where od.refund_time between #{currentMonthStart} and #{currentMonthEnd} and od.order_status = -2 and o.order_status in (-2,-10) and o.museum_id = #{museumId}

select o.unionpay_order_no trade_no from order_detail od inner join `order` o on od.order_id = o.id where od.refund_time between #{currentMonthStart} and #{currentMonthEnd} and date_format(od.pay_success_time, '%Y-%m') != date_format(od.refund_time, '%Y-%m') and od.order_status = -2 and od.museum_id = #{museumId} group by o.unionpay_order_no
select od.*, p.name from order_detail od inner join product p on od.product_id = p.id where od.order_id = #{orderId}
